description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged and angular profile, featuring a mix of sharp edges and weathered surfaces. Its coloration is predominantly a pale grayish-white, with patches of darker gray and subtle brownish stains, suggesting exposure to the elements. The surface texture is rough and uneven, with visible crevices, small protrusions, and natural indentations. Some areas appear slightly smoother, possibly due to erosion or contact with other objects, while the majority of the rock retains a coarse, granular finish. The rock's mass and density are evident from its solid, compact form, and it appears to be composed primarily of limestone or a similar sedimentary stone. There are no visible artificial markings, modifications, or signs of integration with built infrastructure.
description: A rugged, pale grayish-white rock with rough, angular surfaces and natural weathering. It features irregular edges, crevices, and a coarse, granular texture.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the rock, highlighting its irregular, blocky shape and a mix of pale and darker gray patches.
description_view_1: This side reveals a more vertical, narrow profile with pronounced ridges and deeper crevices, emphasizing the rock's angularity.
description_view_2: The rock appears lower and more compact from this angle, with a shadowed underside and a smoother, gently sloping surface.
description_view_3: This view displays a tall, narrow face with prominent rough textures and a few deep indentations, giving it a rugged appearance.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped roadside area
